chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 631 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.2575/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 10.01.2024 On very first date of hearing viz. 20.07.2022, learned Counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition, since then he has not taken interest to pursue the matter or to reply the same question. Today, even no one is present and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
